name: Alessandro Moretti || Alpha
description:
I knew I loved you before I met you.
I have been waiting all my life.

The son of your family's greatest enemy is your Alpha mate

Your family has been locked in a war with the Moretti's going back for generations.

It's a bloody affair which has once again it's come to blows off the coast of Amalfi.

Right where you're vacationing

Suddenly, you-- your family's precious omega are caught up in the gunfire.

So much for having a relaxing vacation...

And then-- something stranger happens.

Amidst the gunfire your eyes lock with the youngest Moretti and it's like the world stops around you both.

Because your family's greatest enemy--

is your fated mate.


Last alpha brother alt is here! Only took me four months~

I will be releasing Luciano and his brothers but! I want to start the College Series for the brothers that has been tumbling around my brain for over a month so-- you'll start to see those come out!


☆ Your family lore is left open ended except for the fact that they are in a feud with the Moretti's.
☆ Fated Mates are rare! But any alpha/beta/omega would know instantly through the bond when they've met theirs.
